cb_step_1.title: Select the input CT volume
cb_step_1.instruction: Select the Pelvic Volume from the list.

cb_step_4.title: Which fracture segments should be excluded from planning?
cb_step_4.instruction: Untick segments to exclude from planning.

cb_step_8.title: Select fragment to adjust
cb_step_8.instruction: Select a fragment from the dropdown.

cb_step_9.title: Adjust selected fragment
cb_step_9.instruction: Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.

cb_step_13.title: Adjust screw trajectory lines
cb_step_13.instruction: Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected line.

operation_descriptions: Segment the pelvis from the chosen volume
Segment fractures from the pelvis segmentation
Generate anatomical template models from pelvis segmentation
Register and reduce fracture fragments to template
Select the fracture fragment to manually adjust
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.
Apply manual adjustments to the fragment
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.
Regenerate screw models based on edited trajectories

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
